name: test_should_select_time_into_local_date_time[localdatetime({year: 1984, week: 10, dayOfWeek: 3, hour: 12, minute: 31, second: 14, millisecond: 645})-{year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, time: other}-'1984-10-11T12:31:14.645']

statusDetails.message:

Actual:   [{'result': '1984-10-11T00:00:00.000000000'}]
